metadata.description: Display name for the workbook in Azure Monitor / Sentinel.
Gallery type: 'sentinel' to appear in Microsoft Sentinel Workbooks gallery, 'workbook' for Azure Monitor.
Full resource ID of the Log Analytics Workspace. Example: /subscriptions/<subId>/resourceGroups/<rg>/providers/Microsoft.OperationalInsights/workspaces/<wsName>
Workbook resource name GUID. Override to redeploy deterministically.
Azure region for the workbook resource.
